common.tagline: Ask questions about your own documents

notFound.title: Page not found
notFound.description: The link may be stale or the address may contain a typo. We couldn't find what you were looking for.

server.title: Something went wrong
server.description: We're aware of the error. Refreshing the page usually helps.

auth.registerSubtitle: Create an account to start asking questions about your documents

forgot.title: Forgot password?
forgot.subtitle: Enter your email and we'll send a reset link.
forgot.sentDescription: If the account exists and isn't Google-only, we've sent a password reset link. It's valid for 1 hour.

reset.title: Set a new password
reset.subtitle: Choose a new password to sign in.
reset.successDescription: You can now sign in with the new password.
reset.invalid: This link is invalid or has expired.

confirm.errorDescription: This link is invalid or has expired. Request a new one from your profile.

errors.passwordTooShort: Password must be at least 8 characters
errors.userExists: A user with this email already exists
errors.serverError: Something went wrong. Please try again
errors.networkError: Could not reach the server. Check that the API is running

chat.title: Chat
chat.emptyDescription: For example: "When does the washing machine warranty expire?" The answer arrives with links to source documents.
chat.inputPlaceholder: Ask a question… (Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line)
chat.askFailed: Failed to get an answer. Please try again
chat.deleteDescription: "{title}" and all of its messages will be permanently removed.

documents.title: Documents
documents.dropHere: Drag files here or click to browse
documents.dropHint: PDF, DOCX, XLSX, TXT, MD, PNG/JPG (OCR) — up to 50 MB
documents.unsupportedType: "{name}": this file type is not supported
documents.fileTooLarge: "{name}": the file is empty or larger than 50 MB
documents.emptyDescription: Upload your first document and you can ask questions about it in the chat.

ocr.emptyRecognition: No text was recognized. Type it manually or cancel.
ocr.saveFailed: Failed to save the recognized text

documents.deleteDescription: "{name}" and all of its search data will be permanently removed.

bulk.selected: {count, plural, one {# document selected} other {# documents selected}}
bulk.confirmDescription: {count, plural, one {# document and all its data will be permanently removed.} other {# documents and all their data will be permanently removed.}}
bulk.deleteSuccess: {count, plural, one {# document deleted} other {# documents deleted}}

emailConfirm.title: Email not confirmed
emailConfirm.description: We sent you a confirmation link when you signed up. Didn't get it — hit "Resend".

password.title: Change password
password.description: Your session stays active after the change — no need to sign in again.

delete.title: Delete account
delete.description: Deletes your account together with all documents, conversations and chat history. This cannot be undone — GDPR-style.
delete.confirmDescription: All documents, conversations and messages will be permanently removed. Enter your password to confirm.
delete.confirmDescriptionNoPassword: All documents, conversations and messages will be permanently removed. This cannot be undone.
